data.title: Responsive Grid System
data.description: Ensures cross-device compatibility and adjusts layout based on screen size.
data.technical_spec: Uses CSS Flexbox and media queries.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: A suite of small services, each running in its own process, allowing for scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Deployed with Docker, orchestrated on Kubernetes.

data.title: Serverless Architecture
data.description: Executes logic without managing servers, enabling automatic scaling.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Distributes content globally to improve load times for users worldwide.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Manages API traffic and helps scale each service independently.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with AWS API Gateway or similar.
